パッケージ nodagumi.ananPJ.Editor.EditCommand

クラス EditCommandBase

  • java.lang.Object
    • nodagumi.ananPJ.Editor.EditCommand.EditCommandBase
  • 直系の既知のサブクラス:
    AddGroup, AddLink, AddNode, AddPolygon, AddSymbolicLink, AddTag, DummyCommand, MoveBackgroundImage, MoveNode, RemoveArea, RemoveBackgroundImage, RemoveGroup, RemoveLink, RemoveNode, RemovePolygon, RemoveSymbolicLink, RemoveTag, RotateBackgroundImage, ScaleTheBackgroundImage, SetBackgroundImage, SetCoordinates, SetDefaultHeight, SetGroupTag, SetHeight, SetLength, SetPolygonHeight, SetScale, SetTrafficRestriction, SetTriangleMeshesCoordinates, SetWidth, SetZIndex, SetZone
    public abstract class EditCommandBase
extends java.lang.Object
    Undo が可能な編集コマンドの抽象クラス
